correctness.summary: F1 RESOLVED — useStartConversation.ts:67-69 restores the filter `if (intent === 'default' || intent === 'walk') payload.intent = intent;` exactly as on baseline 325873b3. Inline comment (lines 64-66) documents the BE Zod enum constraint and why UI-level 'audio'/'camera' must NOT round-trip via payload. `museumName` propagation is preserved (line 60) — that addition was legitimate. F2 RESOLVED — home-proactive-museum-banner.test.tsx:262 now asserts `expect(payload.intent).toBeUndefined()`, with explicit comment lines 260-261 explaining the URL-query is the actual AC22 propagation surface. The follow-up test (lines 268-294) asserts router.push URL contains `intent=audio`. Hook (`useProactiveMuseumSuggestion.ts`) and banner (`ProactiveMuseumBanner.tsx`) untouched vs loop 1 (R1-R26 + AC1-AC20 still satisfied — 2666 tests including 41 B6 still PASS). Wire in (tabs)/home.tsx unchanged (R27 still passes intent: 'audio' which is now correctly downcast in the payload while propagating via URL).

scope-fidelity.summary: F3 RESOLVED — contracts.ts:12 narrowed back to `intent?: 'default' | 'walk'` (verified: zero diff vs baseline 325873b3 for this file). FE/BE wire contract is once again strictly aligned with `CHAT_SESSION_INTENTS = ['default', 'walk']` (museum-backend/src/modules/chat/domain/chat.types.ts:46). The local `ConversationIntent = 'default' | 'camera' | 'audio' | 'walk'` alias in useStartConversation.ts:10 remains as the caller-facing intent enum and downcasts to the wire DTO via the restored filter. Spec R30 `NO BE CHANGE` honoured. AC24 (`ZERO new BE files, ZERO new BE OpenAPI fields, ZERO new BE migrations`) still PASS — `git status museum-backend/` empty.

kiss-dry-hexagonal.summary: Hook and banner unchanged from loop 1 — preserves the score: useLocation façade (R32 honoured, no direct expo-location import), type guard `isEligibleEntry` cleanly narrows fields without non-null assertions, closure-cell cancellation accessor documented in-source. React.memo banner with double-Pressable + stopPropagation (R21). No reach-around to chatApi from banner (R33). The corrective edits in loop 2 only revert + clarify, no new abstraction surface introduced.

a11y-design-system.summary: Unchanged from loop 1. Card root + dismiss carry distinct accessibilityRole='button' + labels (R21, AC18). hitSlop=12 on dismiss → ≥44dp effective hit target (WCAG 2.5.5). Ionicons location/close only — no Unicode emoji (R25, NFR10). DS tokens preserved.

security-honesty.summary: F4 RESOLVED — tracking.md line 73 (2026-05-15) now records the loop 1 issue honestly: `B6 corrective loop 1 : revert intent regression (filter restauré dans useStartConversation, DTO union strict 'default'|'walk', test AC22 ajusté URL-query vs payload). Spec AC22 amendé.` The wording `revert intent regression` explicitly frames the prior filter removal as a regression to undo, not a fix. Spec B6.md:615 AC22 also amended to make the FE/BE intent split contract-explicit (`intent='audio' is downcast (omitted) in the payload to keep the BE contract strict` + `Amendment 2026-05-15 (corrective loop 1) — original wording asserted payload.intent === 'audio' which would yield 400 in prod`). No PII leakage in telemetry (bucket-only). No new permission surface. Verified: only 4 files changed in the corrective loop (useStartConversation.ts revert, contracts.ts revert, test ajusté, spec/tracking amendés). Hook + banner files untouched (`git diff` confirms only intended files modified).

The corrective loop strictly reverted the runtime regression (F1), narrowed back the DTO drift (F3), adjusted the test to assert the truthful split between payload (no intent) and URL query (intent=audio) (F2), and honestly documented the loop 1 mistake in tracking.md + spec amendment (F4).
